response.overview: An unexpected accident has changed Nadia's life when it claims the life of her unborn child. The tragedy has caused Nadia to suffer from Postpartum Psychosis. Nadia and her sister, Alisa, live together with Nadia's husband, Syakir. Nadia frequently visits a psychiatrist to receive therapy treatment and Syakir is always concerned about his wife's health. However, Nadia's health and emotions are often disturbed because of Syakir's ex-wife, Marina, who frequently disrupts the peace of their household. Marina often forces Syakir to give more child support than promised for their six-year-old son, Haziq. Although Syakir never fails to fulfill this responsibility, Marina's extravagant behavior often causes Syakir to quarrel with his ex-wife. After 20 years apart, Imran, Syakir's biological brother, re-enters the lives of Syakir and Nadia. Imran's arrival is followed by various strange occurrences. Secrets carefully kept by Syakir begin to unravel and Nadia's illness worsens.
response.title: Serpihan Sayang
